title: Discurso avanzado · Academic and professional
focus: Higher-register nouns, formal verbs, abstract adjectives and structuring phrases.

words.example: En el ámbito laboral, la confianza es clave.
words.example_en: In the work sphere, trust is key.

words.example: Surgieron problemas de índole técnica.
words.example_en: Problems of a technical nature came up.

words.example: El proyecto cuenta con el respaldo del gobierno.
words.example_en: The project has the government's backing.

words.example: Tiene una trayectoria impecable en el sector.
words.example_en: He has an impeccable track record in the sector.

words.example: Hay una carencia clara de personal cualificado.
words.example_en: There is a clear lack of qualified staff.

words.example: Quisiera destacar tres ideas principales.
words.example_en: I would like to highlight three main ideas.

words.example: Abordemos primero la cuestión económica.
words.example_en: Let's first address the economic issue.

words.example: El autor plantea una pregunta interesante.
words.example_en: The author raises an interesting question.

words.example: Esta decisión implica grandes cambios.
words.example_en: This decision involves big changes.

words.example: Hay que contrastar las dos versiones del informe.
words.example_en: We need to contrast the two versions of the report.

words.example: Asumo toda la responsabilidad del error.
words.example_en: I take full responsibility for the mistake.

words.example: Es un tema polémico que divide opiniones.
words.example_en: It's a controversial topic that divides opinions.

words.example: Es una propuesta razonable y bien argumentada.
words.example_en: It's a reasonable, well-argued proposal.

words.example: La normativa vigente exige un informe anual.
words.example_en: Current regulations require an annual report.

words.example: Hizo un análisis minucioso de los datos.
words.example_en: She did a thorough analysis of the data.

words.example: Decidieron deliberadamente posponer la votación.
words.example_en: They deliberately decided to postpone the vote.

words.example: Supuestamente, llegará el lunes por la mañana.
words.example_en: He's supposedly arriving on Monday morning.

words.example: Es una idea interesante; no obstante, tiene riesgos.
words.example_en: It's an interesting idea; nevertheless, it has risks.

words.example: A grandes rasgos, esa es nuestra estrategia.
words.example_en: Broadly speaking, that is our strategy.

words.example: En términos de tiempo, ganaremos varias horas.
words.example_en: In terms of time, we'll save several hours.

words.example: Aquel comentario dio pie a un largo debate.
words.example_en: That comment gave rise to a long debate.

words.translation_en: to launch, to set in motion
words.example: Hemos puesto en marcha un nuevo programa de formación.
words.example_en: We've launched a new training programme.
